results.title: Shopify Q3 2025 Results: Revenue $2.16 Billion, GMV Reaches $69.7 Billion
results.snippet: Shopify reported Q3 2025 revenue of $2.16 billion, up 26% year-over-year. Gross merchandise volume (GMV) reached $69.7 billion, up 24%. Merchant Solutions revenue grew 28% to $1.63 billion. Subscription Solutions revenue grew 26% to $530 million. Free cash flow margin was 16%.

results.title: Shopify Expands B2B Commerce, Launches Shopify Markets for Cross-Border Selling
results.snippet: Shopify's B2B commerce platform processed over $10 billion in GMV in the first nine months of 2025, up 145% year-over-year. The company launched Shopify Markets to simplify international expansion, enabling merchants to manage multiple storefronts, currencies, and localisation from a single dashboard. Point of Sale (POS) GMV grew 28% as physical retail adoption accelerates.

results.title: Shopify Offloads Logistics Business, Focuses on Platform and Fintech Revenue
results.snippet: Shopify sold its Deliverr logistics operations in 2023 to focus on its core software platform and Shopify Payments. Shopify Balance, its merchant banking product, holds over $2.4 billion in merchant deposits. Shopify Capital has issued over $7 billion in cumulative merchant financing. The platform hosts more than 2 million merchants globally.

results.title: Shopify Launches AI-Powered Sidekick Assistant for Merchants on November 12, 2025
results.snippet: Shopify launched Sidekick, an AI-powered commerce assistant, to all merchants on November 12, 2025. Sidekick uses large language models to help merchants automate customer support, generate product descriptions, analyse sales trends, and optimise ad campaigns. CEO Tobi Lütke said: 'Sidekick is the first AI that truly understands what it means to run a Shopify store.' Early adopters report 30-40% reductions in support ticket volume.
